title: Atlas Expansion VI: Domains 556-585 (Number Theory Deep)

D556.name: Iwasawa theory (main conjecture)
D556.reason: p-adic L-functions; Λ-modules = EML-3 complex analytic

D557.name: p-adic L-functions (Kubota-Leopoldt)
D557.reason: p-adic interpolation of L-values: EML-3 analytic

D560.name: Tamagawa number conjecture
D560.reason: Leading L-value formula: EML-3 analytic number

D563.name: Stark conjectures (units)
D563.reason: Stark units: exp of L-value = EML-3

D568.name: Stable trace formula
D568.reason: Arthur-Selberg trace formula; EML-3 spectral side

D569.name: Fundamental lemma (Ngô)
D569.reason: Orbital integrals equality; Hitchin fibration = EML-3

D571.name: Ramanujan graphs (Lubotzky-PS-Sarnak)
D571.reason: Optimal expanders via Ramanujan bounds: EML-3 (L-functions)

D572.name: Sieve theory (large sieve)
D572.reason: Large sieve inequality: real measurement = EML-2

D580.name: Vojta's conjecture (heights)
D580.reason: Height inequality: h(P) ≤ d(P,D)+ε·h(P): real = EML-2

D581.name: Faltings's theorem (Mordell conjecture)
D581.reason: Finitely many rational points; proof non-constructive = EML-∞

D583.name: Rational points on higher genus curves
D583.reason: Effective Chabauty; no general algorithm = EML-∞

D585.name: Arithmetic Riemann-Roch (Gillet-Soulé)
D585.reason: Arithmetic Chow groups; L²-analytic torsion = EML-3

summary.new_theorem: T145: Atlas Batch 6 (S425): 30 number theory domains; Iwasawa/p-adic = EML-3

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 6 (T145, S425): 30 advanced number theory domains. Iwasawa theory cluster (Iwasawa, p-adic L, Euler systems, Bloch-Kato, Tamagawa): all EML-3. Geometric/automorphic cluster (Fundamental Lemma, Geometric Satake, endoscopy): all EML-3. Subconvexity, Chabauty, Arakelov: EML-2 (real bounds). ABC/Mochizuki, Faltings, higher genus rational points: EML-∞. 0 violations. Total domains: 595.
rabbit_hole_log: Iwasawa cluster: all EML-3 (p-adic L-functions = complex analytic)
Ngô Fundamental Lemma: EML-3 (Hitchin fibration = complex algebraic)
ABC/Mochizuki: EML-∞ (IUT non-constructive); Faltings: EML-∞ (finite but non-constructive)
QUE/Lindenstrauss: EML-3 (measure convergence of Hecke eigenstates)
NEW: T145 Atlas Batch 6 — 30 domains, 0 violations, total 595
